product_overview: Sentimeter is a developer-first feedback collection system that lets end-users submit quick reactions via embedded widgets and lets developers view aggregated analytics on a protected dashboard.
core_goals: Provide a public marketing/landing experience with simple sign-in and sign-up flows
Protect developer dashboard behind authentication and ensure correct redirect behavior for unauthenticated access
Allow signed-in developers to create new projects from the dashboard (MVP)
Surface basic dashboard UI and placeholder metrics for smoke testing

features.name: Signed-out navigation
features.description: Visitors can browse the landing page and access Clerk sign-in and sign-up pages; protected routes redirect to sign-in when unauthenticated.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See Sign In CTA in header -> Click Sign In CTA -> Navigate to /sign-in -> See Clerk sign-in widget -> Click Sign Up link in sign-in widget -> Navigate to /sign-up -> See Clerk sign-up widget
Navigate to /dashboard while signed out -> Get redirected to /sign-in -> See Clerk sign-in widget

features.name: Protected dashboard and Project Creation
features.description: Signed-in users can access /dashboard, view a top nav with avatar, see welcome headline and placeholder stats, and create projects via a modal which triggers a Convex create-project request.
user_flows: Navigate to /sign-in -> Use Clerk sign-in widget to sign in -> After successful sign-in, Navigate to /dashboard -> See dashboard top nav with user avatar -> See welcome headline -> See placeholder stats displayed as dashes (—) -> Click Create Project button -> See Create Project modal -> Fill project name field -> Fill project URL field -> Click Submit in modal -> Observe create project request sent to Convex -> See new project listed on the dashboard
Navigate to /dashboard while signed out -> Get redirected to /sign-in -> Do not sign in -> Remain on /sign-in

Navigate to /dashboard (signed in) -> Click Create Project button -> See Create Project modal -> Leave project name empty -> Fill project URL field -> Click Submit in modal -> See validation error for project name -> Modal remains open and project is not created

routes.description: Signed-in developer dashboard with project overview and project creation capability

features.name: Signed-out navigation
features.description: Visitor can browse landing page and access Clerk auth pages
user_interactions: Click Sign In and view Clerk sign-in widget
Click Sign Up and view Clerk sign-up widget

features.name: Protected dashboard and Project Creation
features.description: Signed-in user can access dashboard, view projects, and create new projects.
user_interactions: Visit /dashboard while signed out and get redirected to /sign-in
Sign in via Clerk and view /dashboard
View list of projects on the dashboard
Fill out project name and URL in the modal

known_limitations.impact: Stats show dashes (—) rather than real data
